What we do

Roofing services

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof, we cover every part of your roof with the same care and attention.

New roofs and re-roofing

Full roof replacements built to last, using quality materials and proper detailing throughout.

Roof repairs

Leaks, slipped tiles and storm damage put right quickly, cleanly and properly first time.

Flat roofing

Durable, watertight flat roofs for extensions, garages and dormers, designed to drain properly.

Chimney repairs and repointing

Repointing, rebuilds and flashing to keep your chimney sound, safe and weathertight.

Leadwork and flashings

Expert lead valleys, soakers and flashings that seal the joints where water finds its way in.

Gutters, fascias and soffits

Clean lines and proper drainage to protect your roofline, walls and foundations.

Why New Heights

Why choose us

We treat every roof like it is our own. Honest advice, tidy work and a finish that lasts.

Local and reliable

Based in the area and known in it. We turn up when we say we will.

Tidy and respectful

We protect your property, clear up every day and leave the site spotless.

Honest pricing

Clear, written quotes with no hidden extras and no nasty surprises.

Guaranteed workmanship

Quality materials and proven detailing, backed by our workmanship guarantee.

Free quotes and advice

We will take a proper look, explain your options and quote with no obligation.

Every type of roof

Pitched, flat, slate, tile, lead and more, on homes old and new.

Meet the owner

Built on a name worth protecting

New Heights Roofing Company is run by Hughie, a roofer with years of hands-on experience across Warwickshire and the Cotswolds. What started as a passion for doing the job properly has grown into a trusted local name built on word of mouth and repeat custom.

Every job, big or small, gets the same approach: an honest assessment, a clear quote and work carried out to a standard that lasts. When Hughie quotes a roof, he is the one on it, so you always know who you are dealing with from the first phone call to the final tidy up.

Placeholder bio. Send me Hughie's real background, years in the trade and a photo and I will finalise this.
